## Description

Provide a brief summary of the change, including what was modified and the general goal of this PR.

## Related Issue

Closes #[issue_number] OR Relates to #[issue_number]

## Type of Change

Please tick the options that are relevant to this PR:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (structural code cleanup with no user-facing changes)
- [ ] Chore (dependency bumps, gradle updates, or build script tweaks)

## What problem does this PR solve?

Explain the business logic, UX friction, or bug details that this pull request addresses.

## What structural changes were made?

List the key components, data layers, ViewModels, or Composables that were added, removed, or modified.

## How was this tested?

Describe the test environment and coverage. 
*Note: For any UI or layout changes, please attach screenshots or screen recordings showcasing the visual differences.*

- [ ] Unit Tests
- [ ] Roborazzi UI tests
- [ ] Manual device verification (state model/features tested)

## Checklist

Confirm that this PR meets the repository guidelines:

- [ ] Code follows the project's Kotlin and Jetpack Compose style conventions outlined in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Branch name and commit messages follow the naming and Conventional Commits conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code diff
- [ ] I have added/updated unit or UI tests where applicable
- [ ] No new compiler warnings or build configurations errors have been introduced
